data.action_plan: Follow-up in 2 days, monitor symptoms, consider eye examination if symptoms persist
data.clinical_observations: Patient reports constant headache, worse with screen time, eye strain, and strained vision. No fever or other symptoms.
data.diagnosis: Possible eye strain, differential diagnoses: migraine, sinusitis
data.doctor_notes: Patient's symptoms are likely related to prolonged screen time and inadequate sleep. Consider eye examination if symptoms persist.
data.symptoms: headache, pain in eyes, strained vision, eye strain
data.treatment_advice: Reduce screen time, get enough sleep (7-8 hours), consider eye drops for relief
data.verification_notes: Patient confirmed symptoms, denied fever or other symptoms

history.ai_response: Good morning, what brings you here in today?

history.user_utterance: Good morning, Doctor. I have been having a headache and pain in my eyes.

history.ai_response: Since when you have been experiencing this?

history.user_utterance: It started about two days ago.

history.ai_response: Is the headache constant or does it come and go?

history.user_utterance: It's mostly constant but it gets worse when I look at the screens.

history.ai_response: Where exactly is the headache located?

history.user_utterance: Mostly around my forehead and behind my eyes.

history.ai_response: Do you have any other symptoms like fever, nausea or blood, vision?

history.user_utterance: No fever, but sometimes my vision feels slightly strained.

history.ai_response: How many hours do you spend on screens daily?

history.user_utterance: Around eight to ten hours I work on a laptop.

history.ai_response: That could be causing eye strain.

history.user_utterance: Not really, maybe five to six hours.
